_comment: Sample only. The real registry lives at Wiki/Data/meeting-registry.json (gitignored — Data/ never publishes). One entry per registered recurring meeting; capture-meeting's Tier-1 branch matches event titles against entry names. This file's Acorndyne/CacheTrack/GMS/Ledger/CAP vocabulary is the canonical placeholder source for the whole knowledge-ingress skill family (calibration-surface.md, capture-meeting/SKILL.md, gatekeeper/SKILL.md, automated-write-plan.md) — see dotty/.claude/skills/sample-universe/universe.md.
